name: Chaplain
lore: The Chaplain Order, established towards the end of the Great Crusade, was intended to create a cadre of fearsome veteran warriors who would enforce a cohesion of doctrine and belief in the scattered and increasingly idiosyncratic Legions far from Terra. Theirs was a mortuary symbol of sacrifice graven in the form of an ornate staff, mace or axe: the Crozius Arcanum, which served as both a badge of office and a deadly weapon. On battlefields innumerable, such warriors stood firm in even the most dire circumstances reminding their forces of the expectations of their brethren and their Primarch.

wargearOptions.description: This Model may have its bolt pistol exchanged for one item from the Legion Pistols list.
This Model may have melta bombs selected for it for +5 Points.
